267291657:
New: Automatic update checks — Live Watch now tells you when a new version is available, with a configurable check interval and a manual
  'Check for updates' button in Settings.
New: First-launch Terms of Use & Privacy Policy consent screen; your choice is remembered so you only see it once.
New: Smooth fade-and-rise transition animations when moving between pages.

Fixed: Streams that failed to play with 'ERROR_CODE_PARSING_CONTAINER_UNSUPPORTED' now play correctly — HLS streams without an .m3u8    
  link are detected and retried automatically.
Improved: Clearer playback error messages and a more polished, consistent UI throughout the app.
